description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and logs in to the GitLab Container Registry in a before_script using docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" $CI_REGISTRY. Define a single stage named build. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, is excluded from the master branch (except: master), and executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . followed by docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". Add a build-master job that also runs in the build stage, runs only on the master branch, and executes docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE".
